framework.name: Existing Payment Systems Designed for Humans, Not Bots
framework.description: Today's financial infrastructure and fraud detection systems were explicitly designed for human actors and actively try to distinguish automated systems from genuine users. This creates a fundamental tension when attempting to enable legitimate autonomous agent payments — the systems need retraining to differentiate 'good bots' from malicious ones.
framework.raw_quote: In fact, dozens of startups and projects are now exploring 'agentic payments,' recognizing that today's financial systems were 'explicitly designed for humans, not bots,' and need adaptation to support autonomous agents.

source.title: Enabling Autonomous AI Agents to Make Payments - LinkedIn
